initial_error: Source build could not find Python.h for Python 3.12.
resolution: Extracted the Ubuntu ARM64 libpython3.12-dev package into fig4/benchmark/method_envs/python3.12-dev-root and built inside the isolated Dara environment.

initial_error: Official Linux executable returned Exec format error on the ARM64 host because it is x86-64.
resolution: Preserved the official executables and added isolated wrappers using QEMU user-static 8.2.2 with an extracted x86-64 glibc 2.39 runtime.
